Our Students Have Completed the 7th US Summer School Program

25.09.2023

The summer school education of our students who successfully completed the preparatory program was completed in the US.

The International Summer School program, organized for the seventh time this year through the collaboration of Ibn Haldun University and George Mason University, has concluded in the United States.

Our students, who received academic education in various fields of social sciences, had the opportunity to get to know American society better through historical and cultural excursions.

Throughout the program, our students visited cities such as Washington DC, New York, Philadelphia, and New Jersey, gaining new experiences.
